\caption{Descriptive measurement-audit distributions on the RQL arm of the $64^2$ detail cohort ($5400$ audited cells; $\mathrm{audit\_status}=\textsc{ok}$ for all $5400/5400$). Per $(\bar\rho,\nu)$: the refit-bootstrap discrepancy-ratio $d_{\mathrm{ratio}}$ quantiles and the count of leak-suspect cells (True in $30$ of $5400$ cells overall). \emph{The audit is descriptive and is not a model-adequacy test:} all audit statistics are excluded from regularization selection, reconstruction, cell inclusion, and every confirmatory pass/fail decision. The reference distribution is conditional on a smoothed plug-in scene, so its tail ranks are not calibrated model-class $p$-values and can be anti-conservative when the true scene is rougher than the plug-in.}
\label{tab:s8_audit}\\
